headline.zh-CN: 评论区新增 @issue 问题引用选择器
headline.en: @issue picker lands in all comment inputs

summary.zh-CN: 在所有讨论和评论输入框中，输入 @i 即可弹出当前曲目问题的选择器，支持按编号过滤和键盘操作，选中后自动插入 @issue:N 并渲染为可点击的问题链接。
summary.en: Typing @i in any discussion or comment input now opens a picker of the current track's issues with filter-by-number and full keyboard support. Selecting an item inserts @issue:N, which renders as a clickable issue chip.

title.zh-CN: 评论区新增 @issue 问题引用选择器
title.en: Comment inputs gain an @issue reference picker

description.zh-CN: 在曲目讨论、母带讨论、母带沟通侧边栏、问题详情评论以及创建问题时的描述框中，输入 @i 即可弹出当前曲目问题列表，继续输入数字可按 local_number 前缀过滤。支持 ↑ ↓ 切换、Enter/Tab 插入、Esc 关闭、鼠标点击；选中后自动补齐为 @issue:N。
description.en: Track discussions, mastering discussions, the mastering chat sidebar, issue-detail comment boxes, and the issue creation description box now all surface the same @issue picker. Typing @i opens the list of the current track's issues; additional digits filter by local_number prefix. Arrow keys navigate, Enter/Tab inserts, Escape dismisses, and the selected issue is inserted as @issue:N.

title.zh-CN: 修复：曲目讨论中的引用语法提示从未出现
title.en: Fix: reference syntax hint never appeared in track discussions

description.zh-CN: 之前 DiscussionPanel 的 enableReferencePopover 由于 Vue 可选 boolean 属性默认被规范为 false，导致讨论区从未挂载过语法提示 popover。现在该属性默认值显式为 true，讨论框在输入时间戳、标记或问题引用时都会出现语法提示。
description.en: DiscussionPanel's enableReferencePopover was effectively forced to false because Vue normalizes unspecified optional boolean props to false, which meant the reference-syntax popover never mounted inside discussion inputs. The default is now explicitly true, so typing timestamps, marker references, or issue references again surfaces the syntax hint.
